base.defaultDescription: AI Beauty Stylist helps you find makeup looks, virtual try-on results, and beauty guidance that fit you.

navigation.guideBeautyNotesDesc: Practical beauty comparisons and AI try-on notes.
navigation.guideScenariosDesc: Choose makeup for where you are going.
navigation.guideFeaturesDesc: Guidance for face and skin features.
navigation.guideBeginnerDesc: Start with a clear, repeatable routine.
navigation.guideFeaturedTitle: AI try-on or beauty filter? Know the difference.

privacy.photoPurpose: Your photo is only used to generate your personalized look and tutorial
privacy.deletion: You can delete your photo and results at any time
privacy.noTraining: Will not be used for model training without consent

errors.consentRequired: Please confirm the photo consent before uploading
errors.aiTimeout: Generation timed out. Quota refunded, please try again

footer.brandDesc: Upload a selfie, compare makeup looks on your own face, and choose with context from scene, skin tone, and finish.
footer.disclaimerText: AI diagnosis and try-on results are for beauty reference only and do not constitute medical, skincare, or professional beauty advice.
footer.helpLegalNavigation: Help, support, company, and legal navigation
footer.featureGuidesNavigation: Makeup guides by face and skin features

homepage.jsonLdDescription: An online AI makeup try-on tool for uploading a selfie, previewing makeup looks, and using scene, skin tone, and finish guidance as beauty reference.
homepage.heroTitleSpan: see which makeup direction fits better
homepage.heroSubtitle: Choose looks by commute, date, photo, or event scenarios, then upload a selfie for an AI-generated face preview.
homepage.pricingRule: Start free · Choose a plan only when you need more
homepage.trustRecommendDesc: Filter commute, date, photo, and event looks
homepage.trustPrivacyDesc: Confirm before upload and delete records
homepage.dragSlider: Drag to compare before and after
homepage.statsTryonsLabel: Choose a look, upload a selfie, review the result
homepage.statsRealismLabel: One diagnosis or try-on uses one credit
homepage.howTitle: From look selection to face preview in a short flow
homepage.howSubtitle: Browse the look first, upload a selfie only when ready, then judge whether the result fits your features, skin tone, and scenario.

howSteps.title: Choose a Look
howSteps.copy: Pick by daily wear, dating, photos, events, or evening occasions.

howSteps.title: Upload a Selfie
howSteps.copy: Use a clear front-facing photo and confirm consent before generation starts.

howSteps.title: Review the Result
howSteps.copy: Check complexion, structure, and finish before saving or trying another look.

homepage.workflowPreviewAlt: Peach complexion look shown in the try-on workspace
homepage.featuredSubtitle: Start with high-frequency scenarios and quickly find looks ready to try.
homepage.aiTitle: Not a simple filter, but a result that looks like real makeup
homepage.aiSubtitle: The system focuses on facial lighting, skin tone, makeup edges, and scenario needs to help you rule out poor-fit looks faster.

aiFeatures.title: Lighting-Aware
aiFeatures.copy: Preserves the original light and shadow as much as possible to reduce a mask-like finish.

aiFeatures.title: Skin-Respecting
aiFeatures.copy: Avoids over-smoothing and focuses on whether the look fits your real face.

aiFeatures.title: Scenario-Based
aiFeatures.copy: Work, interviews, dates, and photos each need a different makeup intensity.

aiFeatures.title: Clear Boundaries
aiFeatures.copy: Photo processing is confirmed before upload, and results can be deleted in the workspace.

homepage.aiVisualAlt: Refined rose makeup with natural skin texture and lighting
homepage.aiVisualCaption: This visual explains the dimensions used to judge a look. Your result will adapt to the lighting, skin tone, and features in your selfie.
homepage.scenarioTitle: Choose by where you need to show up today
homepage.scenarioSubtitle: The best look is not always the strongest one. It is the one that helps you look stable in photos, interviews, dates, or social settings.

scenarioHighlights.label: Commute Freshness
scenarioHighlights.reason: A peach-toned lightweight base helps tired skin look more awake.

scenarioHighlights.label: Interview Polish
scenarioHighlights.reason: Clean brows, defined eyes, and natural color keep the focus on your expression.

scenarioHighlights.label: Soft Date Blur
scenarioHighlights.reason: Low-saturation rose milk tones soften lips and cheeks without looking heavy on camera.

scenarioHighlights.label: Flash-Ready Satin
scenarioHighlights.reason: A satin finish controls reflection for flash photos and close-up shots.

scenarioHighlights.label: Mature Skin Radiance
scenarioHighlights.reason: Keeps skin texture visible while adding soft brightness and freshness.

scenarioHighlights.label: Wedding Guest Polish
scenarioHighlights.reason: More complete than daily makeup without stealing the spotlight.

homepage.proofSubtitle: Instead of abstract star ratings, we connect the scenario, visible change, and judgment criteria so you can choose faster.

proofCases.need: Need: healthy color without pink tones turning gray
proofCases.title: For olive undertones, first judge whether rose feels balanced
proofCases.copy: A restrained rose tone helps you assess the relationship between lip, cheek, and skin tone.
proofCases.outcome: Check: a clear complexion and naturally fresher lip-cheek color

proofCases.title: For night photos, check reflection and structure
proofCases.copy: A satin finish keeps dimension while controlling areas that can overexpose.
proofCases.outcome: Check: T-zone reflection and enough lip color on camera

proofCases.need: Need: radiance without hiding skin texture
proofCases.title: Reduce heavy powder and judge natural brightness
proofCases.copy: Soft illumination helps with dullness without creating an over-smoothed mask effect.
proofCases.outcome: Check: natural texture and a brighter, more rested center face

proofPrinciples.title: Start with the scenario
proofPrinciples.copy: Work, dates, and photos each need a different makeup intensity.

proofPrinciples.title: Keep real skin texture
proofPrinciples.copy: Judge whether the look fits instead of judging only smoothing.

proofPrinciples.title: Use the result to decide
proofPrinciples.copy: Compare complexion, structure, and finish before trying again.

homepage.assuranceTitle: Upload with confidence and stay in control
homepage.assuranceSubtitle: Browsing looks uses no quota. Generation starts only after you confirm upload, and originals and results remain manageable.

uploadConcerns.title: You confirm before upload
uploadConcerns.copy: Your selfie enters the try-on flow only after you explicitly agree.

uploadConcerns.title: Delete photos and results
uploadConcerns.copy: Manage original selfies, try-on results, and diagnosis records separately.

uploadConcerns.title: No generation, no quota used
uploadConcerns.copy: Quota is used only when generation begins, and failed tasks are refunded.

homepage.upgradeTitle: Want to compare a few more looks first?
homepage.upgradeCopy: Pro fits weekly try-ons, HD saves, and AI facial diagnosis. Premium fits shoots, weddings, or interviews with priority generation and the full look catalog.
homepage.finalCtaSubtitle: Upload your first selfie and see your AI try-on result in 30 seconds.

workspace.loginDesc: Sign in to claim free generation credits, then upload a selfie to see your real try-on result.
workspace.freeBenefits: Monthly free credits · Save history · AI facial diagnosis access
workspace.lowQuotaHint: Save it for the look you most want to confirm; upgrade for more credits and HD downloads.
workspace.proPerks: HD downloads, detailed tutorials, AI facial diagnosis enabled
workspace.premiumPerks: Priority queue, full look catalog, long-term history enabled

cookie.title: Cookie & Local Storage Settings
cookie.description: We use essential cookies to maintain visitor sessions and quota state. Non-essential analytics or ad tracking is not enabled yet; we will ask again before enabling it.
cookie.allSaved: Cookie preferences saved; no extra analytics tracking is currently enabled
